title: Three Eras
description: Three connected images that keep one fictional woman recognizable across Victorian, neon apartment, and desert observatory scenes.
creative_direction: Series package focused on character identity continuity: same fictional woman, similar wardrobe motif, three connected environments, reference-chain consistency.

en.title: Three Eras
en.description: Three connected images that keep one fictional woman recognizable across Victorian, neon apartment, and desert observatory scenes.

zh-CN.title: 三重时代
zh-CN.description: 三张连续图像，在维多利亚客厅、霓虹公寓和沙漠天文台中保持同一位虚构女性的可识别身份。
